responses: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! Welcome to AI Chatbot.
Greetings! What would you like to know?
I am an AI Chatbot designed to answer your questions.
I'm a virtual assistant built using Python and Flask.
Artificial Intelligence enables machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence.
AI is the simulation of human intelligence in machines and computer systems.
AI helps computers learn, reason, and solve problems like humans.
Machine Learning is a subset of AI that allows computers to learn from data.
Machine Learning uses algorithms to identify patterns and make predictions.
ML enables systems to improve automatically through experience.
Deep Learning is a branch of Machine Learning based on neural networks.
Deep Learning models can automatically learn complex patterns from large datasets.
Deep Learning is widely used in image recognition and NLP.
Python is a powerful and easy-to-learn programming language.
Python is widely used in AI, Machine Learning, Data Science, and Web Development.
Python is known for its simple syntax and readability.
Python is simple, readable, portable, and platform-independent.
Python supports object-oriented programming and thousands of libraries.
Python is easy to learn and widely used in industry.
Popular Python libraries include NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, TensorFlow, and Scikit-learn.
TensorFlow and PyTorch are commonly used for Deep Learning projects.
Pandas is widely used for data analysis and manipulation.
A Neural Network is a computing system inspired by the human brain.
Neural Networks consist of input, hidden, and output layers.
Neural Networks are widely used in Deep Learning.
CNN stands for Convolutional Neural Network.
CNNs are mainly used for image classification and computer vision.
CNN automatically extracts features from images using convolution layers.
NLP enables computers to understand and process human language.
NLP is used in chatbots, translation systems, and voice assistants.
Natural Language Processing combines AI and linguistics.
A chatbot is a software application that interacts with users through text or voice.
Chatbots use AI and NLP to understand user queries.
Chatbots are widely used in customer support and virtual assistants.
TensorFlow is an open-source Deep Learning framework developed by Google.
TensorFlow is widely used for AI and Machine Learning projects.
TensorFlow supports neural networks, NLP, and computer vision.
PyTorch is an open-source Machine Learning framework developed by Meta.
PyTorch is popular for Deep Learning research and development.
PyTorch provides dynamic computation graphs and easy model building.
You're welcome!
Happy to help!
Glad I could assist.
Goodbye! Have a wonderful day.
See you later!
Take care and happy learning!
